description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds C++ code in a matrix of variants including CPU, CUDA, and ROCm. The workflow should trigger on push and pull request events, but ignore pushes to gh-readonly-queue. It should use a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs and runs on an ubuntu-22.04 environment. For each variant, it should set up Python 3.11, install dependencies, and then build the C++ code using a script. Additionally, include a second job that checks if the build job succeeded.
